'''yalate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kinetically|kinetically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kinetically|kinetically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yalate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yalate|yalate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yalatesher|yalatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yalatesherĂ«m|yalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yalatero|yalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yalateshĂ«|yalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yalateshĂ«m|yalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyalatero|gokiyalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyalateshĂ«|gokiyalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyalateshĂ«m|gokiyalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyalankerom|goyalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyalankeshĂ«|goyalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyalankeshĂ«m|goyalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyalankeya|goyalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yalaterom|yalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yalatemu|yalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yalateya|yalateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyalaterom|gokiyalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyalatemu|gokiyalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyalateya|gokiyalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yalalate|yalalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yalalatesher|yalalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yalalatesherĂ«m|yalalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yalalatero|yalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yalalateshĂ«|yalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yalalateshĂ«m|yalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyalalatero|gokiyalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyalalateshĂ«|gokiyalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyalalateshĂ«m|gokiyalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyalalankerom|goyalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyalalankeshĂ«|goyalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyalalankeshĂ«m|goyalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyalalankeya|goyalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yalalaterom|yalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yalalatemu|yalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yalalateya|yalalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyalalaterom|gokiyalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyalalatemu|gokiyalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyalalateya|gokiyalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠte|yĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠtesher|yĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠtero|yĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠlĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠlĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠterom|yĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠtemu|yĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠlĂŠteya|yĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠlĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠlĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yaflafte|yaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yaflaftesher|yaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaflaftesherĂ«m|yaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yaflaftero|yaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yaflafteshĂ«|yaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaflafteshĂ«m|yaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyaflaftero|gokiyaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyaflafteshĂ«|gokiyaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyaflafteshĂ«m|gokiyaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyaflafnkerom|goyaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyaflafnkeshĂ«|goyaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyaflafnkeshĂ«m|goyaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyaflafnkeya|goyaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yaflafterom|yaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaflaftemu|yaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yaflafteya|yaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyaflafterom|gokiyaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyaflaftemu|gokiyaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyaflafteya|gokiyaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
